## Checklist

- [ ] Card follows the [AVE Card schema](./ave-database/README.md#ave-card-schema)
- [ ] JSON passes validation (`python -m ave validate <card.json>`)
- [ ] Markdown companion file included (`.md` alongside `.json`)
- [ ] Proof of Concept attached or referenced
- [ ] No active exploits targeting live production systems
- [ ] I agree to [CC-BY-SA-4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/) licensing
